mapper.select: select sci.cart_item_id, sci.shop_id, sci.spu_id, sci.sku_id, sci.count, sci.price_fee, sci.is_checked, s.name as spu_name, s.main_img_url from shop_cart_item sci inner join spu s on sci.spu_id = s.spu_id where sci.user_id = #{userId} and s.status != -1 order by sci.cart_item_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into shop_cart_item (shop_id, spu_id, sku_id, user_id, count, price_fee, is_checked) values (#{shopId}, #{spuId}, #{skuId}, #{userId}, #{count}, #{priceFee}, #{isChecked})
mapper.update: update shop_cart_item set is_checked = #{isChecked} where user_id = #{userId} and cart_item_id = #{cartItemId}
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(count), 0) from shop_cart_item where user_id = #{userId}
